name: Snowflake Cortex MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official Snowflake MCP server enabling AI agents to query Snowflake data warehouses, execute SQL, use Snowflake Cortex AI functions (in-database LLM), and interact with Snowflake's data cloud platform.
use_cases: Querying Snowflake data warehouses with SQL from analytics agents
Using Snowflake Cortex AI for in-database text summarization and analysis
Data exploration and schema discovery for agent-driven analytics
Running Snowflake tasks and stored procedures from orchestration agents
Semantic querying via Cortex Analyst natural language to SQL
not_for: Teams not using Snowflake for data warehousing
best_when: An agent needs to query a Snowflake data warehouse for analytics, use Cortex AI for in-database intelligence, or orchestrate data engineering tasks.
avoid_when: You're using BigQuery, Redshift, or other data warehouses — use those integrations.

auth.notes: Key pair auth recommended for agents (no password required). OAuth for federated identity. Role-based access controls are Snowflake's core security model.

pricing.notes: Credit-card not required for trial. Enterprise pricing can be significant. Cortex AI functions consume credits.

performance.rate_limits: Warehouse concurrency limits; SQL API rate limits apply

known_agent_gotchas: Snowflake's role system is complex — agents must be granted appropriate roles
Virtual warehouse must be running — agents incur credit cost when warehouse auto-resumes
Key pair auth setup is multi-step — RSA key generation and public key upload required
SQL API has different URL format than JDBC/ODBC — must use correct endpoint
Cortex Analyst (NL to SQL) is in preview — behavior may change
Long-running queries can time out — implement query result polling for large queries
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. RBAC with fine-grained roles is best-in-class for data warehouse security. Key pair auth eliminates password risk. SOC 2, ISO 27001, FedRAMP, HIPAA, PCI DSS. Enterprise-grade.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Snowflake's RBAC is among the most granular in data platforms. Key pair auth. FedRAMP, SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, PCI DSS. Exceptional security.
